ab: kemuda sun a sema tapaw?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: uli ungeting aken ta zidusiya sema tapaw.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: uli kemuda vaik a biuing timadju?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: na djemavac timadju sema biuing.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: uli kemuda sun vaik a sema penhu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: uli ljivavaw aken ta hikuki sema penghu.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: uli kemuda sun vaik a sema penghu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: uli ljivavaw aken ta varukur sema penghu.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: anema su ljivavaven a sema tjumaq.
en: How do you go home?

ab: ljivavaw ta tjiing a sema tjumaq.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: anema ljivavaven ni tjuku a sema gaku?
en: How does tjuku go to school?

ab: ljivavaw ta kisia sema gaku ti tjuku.
en: tjuku goes to school by train.

ab: anema ljivavaven ni camak a sema kiukay?
en: How does camak go to church?

ab: padjidingsia ti camak sema kiukay.
en: camak goes to church by bicycle.

ab: ljivavaw sun ta tjiing sema gaku?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: ui, padjidingsia ken a sema gaku.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: uli ljivavaw sun ta kauty sema takaw?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: ui, ljivavaw aken ta kauty sema takaw.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: uli ljivavaw sun ta kisia tuki hikuki? a sema taitu?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: ljivavaw aken ta hikuki, ljivavaw ta hikuki tja djaljaw tua kisia.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: uli ljivavaw ta basu tuki emungeting a sema kiukay?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: emungeting aken sema kuikay, nu paka ta basu tja salenguaq a emungeting.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: demut a iciba ta nu umaq?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: ljacadja, nu vaik sema iciba pautubay aken.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: aza iubingkiyuku a kinacadjan kata gaku demut ri ?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: ljadut, djemavac itjen.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: aza kakanan a kinacadjan kata tisiaba demut ri ?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: tjevuta ta tisiaba djemavac tu lima bung djemaljun.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
